_comment: Curated Python package renames. Each entry: old import name -> new canonical name. Add entries with care — these trigger lint warnings in real code.

PyPDF2.reason: PyPDF2 was renamed to pypdf. The PyPDF2 package still exists for legacy installs but is unmaintained.

sklearn.reason: The PyPI distribution is 'scikit-learn'; 'sklearn' is the import name from older docs and won't install via pip.

PIL.reason: PIL was abandoned in 2011. Pillow is the maintained fork; the import name is still PIL.

cv2.reason: The PyPI package is 'opencv-python' (or 'opencv-contrib-python'); the import name is 'cv2'. Common confusion — this is the canonical name and DOES work, so this entry is informational only.

BeautifulSoup.reason: BeautifulSoup (capital S) is the old package. The current import name is 'bs4' (from 'beautifulsoup4' on PyPI).

yaml.reason: Common confusion: pip installs 'pyyaml' but the import name is 'yaml'. This is correct usage, not deprecated — entry is informational.

urllib2.reason: urllib2 was renamed to urllib.request in Python 3. If you see this import, the code is Python 2.

urlparse.reason: urlparse was moved to urllib.parse in Python 3.

distutils.reason: distutils was deprecated in Python 3.10 and removed in 3.12. Use setuptools.distutils or the standard library alternatives.

imp.reason: The 'imp' module was deprecated in Python 3.4 and removed in 3.12. Use importlib instead.

optparse.reason: optparse has been superseded by argparse since Python 3.2.

commands.reason: The 'commands' module was removed in Python 3. Use subprocess instead.

md5.reason: The 'md5' module was removed in Python 3. Use hashlib.md5() instead.

sha.reason: The 'sha' module was removed in Python 3. Use hashlib.sha1() instead.

htmllib.reason: The 'htmllib' module was removed in Python 3. Use html.parser instead.

mutex.reason: The 'mutex' module was removed in Python 3. Use threading.Lock() instead.

new.reason: The 'new' module was removed in Python 3. Use types.SimpleNamespace for similar functionality.

robotparser.reason: robotparser was moved to urllib.robotparser in Python 3.

whichdb.reason: The 'whichdb' module was deprecated in Python 3.13. Use dbm directly.
